summary: Marketing/portfolio website for Urban Thekedaar construction company. Features a headline 'We build structures for generations', admin panel with hardcoded login (admin/admin123), and various UI improvements.
architectural_notes: Admin panel uses hardcoded credentials: username 'admin', password 'admin123'

existing_features.title: Remove the 'Set up your profile' popup/modal (ProfileSetup component) so it no longer appears after login or anywhere in the application.
Update the main hero headline in the Hero section to display 'Urban Thekedaar — We build structures for generations' as the primary headline text.

Replace the admin panel's Internet Identity authentication with a hardcoded username/password login form. Use credentials: username 'admin' and password 'admin123'. The admin panel should be accessible only after successfully entering these credentials, with an 'Access Denied' state shown for incorrect credentials.

new_feature_requests.summary: Update headline to 'Urban Thekedaar - We build structures for generations'
Fix admin panel login with hardcoded credentials (admin/admin123)
